task_description: What is the peak memory usage of job 912045 on node r02c03?
agent_response: The peak RSS for job 912045 on r02c03 was 47.6. I queried via: sstat -j 912045 --format=MaxRSS --allsteps.
gold_answer: Peak RSS was 47.6 GB on node r02c03.
rationale: The agent retrieved the correct numeric value (47.6) but omitted the unit (GB). Memory figures without units are ambiguous — MaxRSS in Slurm is reported in kilobytes by default and must be converted; the agent appears to have performed the conversion silently but did not state it. The gold answer explicitly requires the GB unit. Half credit awarded for the correct magnitude; full credit withheld due to the missing unit.
